title: rapide M&P Masking Tape & Dust Sheet 150cm x 20M
description: RAPIDE M&P Masking Tape & Dust Sheet 150cm x 20M The RAPIDE M&P Masking Tape & Dust Sheet offers a convenient solution for protecting surfaces during painting and renovation projects. With a durable plastic construction and versatile design, this multi-functional product ensures reliable performance and easy application. Key Features: Dual Functionality: Combines masking tape and dust sheet in one product, providing comprehensive surface protection during painting and renovation tasks. Durable Material: Crafted from high-quality plastic, ensuring durability and resilience to withstand paint spills, dust, and debris. Convenient Size: Generous dimensions of 150cm x 20M offer ample coverage for various surfaces, making it suitable for both large and small projects. Versatile Use: Ideal for use on walls, floors, furniture, and other surfaces, offering versatility and flexibility in application. Multi-Coloured: Features a multi-coloured design, allowing for easy identification and differentiation from other masking tapes or dust sheets. Specifications: Material: Plastic Colour: Multi Protect your surfaces with ease during painting and renovation projects using the RAPIDE M&P Masking Tape & Dust Sheet - the ultimate solution for reliable surface protection.
